; # roundtrip sample
; co-authored by 断红尘 & fltLi
; -------- cover.txt --------
changeBg:ext/海岸.png -transform={"position":{"x":200,"y":-200},"scale":{"x":1.2,"y":1.2},"brightness":0.64,"contrast":1.08,"saturation":0.985,"gamma":0.956,"bloom":1.0,"bloomBrightness":0.85,"bloomBlur":2} -next;
changeFigure:ext/爱音复古棕色风衣/037_school_winter-2023.model.json -right -id=anon -motion=sad02 -expression=cry01 -transform={"position":{"x":-150,"y":20},"scale":{"x":1.1,"y":1.1},"blur":1,"brightness":0.8,"contrast":1.1,"saturation":0.9,"gamma":0.8,"colorRed":242,"colorGreen":216,"colorBlue":194,"bloom":0.5,"bloomBrightness":0.761,"bloomBlur":15,"bevel":0.556,"bevelThickness":11,"bevelRotation":30.0,"bevelRed":255,"bevelGreen":212,"bevelBlue":176} -next;
; -------- start.txt --------
; 自动播放速度: 18
wait:5000;
intro:永生者长崎素世和穿越者千早爱音|原作: LOFTER @断红尘 -fontSize=medium -fontColor=rgba(255,255,255,1) -backgroundColor=rgba(0,0,0,1) -delayTime=1600 -hold;
wait:600;
callScene:1.txt;
wait:1600;
callScene:2.txt;
wait:2000;
callScene:3.txt;
intro:END -fontSize=medium -fontColor=rgba(255,255,255,1) -backgroundColor=rgba(0,0,0,1) -delayTime=3000 -hold;
; -------- 1.txt --------
bgm:ext/夢の歩みを見上げて.flac;
:千早爱音死了。;
wait:200;
:也许是昨天，也许是今天，也许是明天，我不知道。;
wait:300;
; --------
pixiPerform:rain;
changeBg:ext/白桦林.png -transform={"position":{"x":-760,"y":-300},"scale":{"x":1.6,"y":1.6},"brightness":0.86,"contrast":0.8,"saturation":0.7,"gamma":0.5,"colorRed":255,"colorGreen":234,"colorBlue":214,"bloom":1.0,"bloomBrightness":0.7,"bloomBlur":2} -next;
:雨淅淋沥沥，如同独活之人的眼泪。;
changeFigure:soyo/live_event_297_ur/model.json -id=soyo -motion=soyo/serious02 -transform={"brightness":0.8,"contrast":1.1,"saturation":0.9,"gamma":0.8,"colorRed":242,"colorGreen":216,"colorBlue":194,"bloom":0.5,"bloomBrightness":0.8,"bloomBlur":10,"bevel":1.0,"bevelThickness":15,"bevelRotation":30.0,"bevelRed":255,"bevelGreen":212,"bevelBlue":176} -next;
:白桦林下，一个身披长袍，带着尖顶帽的素发少女，拿着扫帚轻轻扫出墓碑前的落叶。;
changeFigure:soyo/live_event_297_ur/model.json -id=soyo -motion=soyo/sad01 -next;
:“千早爱音之墓”;
changeFigure:soyo/live_event_297_ur/model.json -id=soyo -motion=soyo/sad02 -next;
长崎素世:567年七月13天6小时23秒，小爱音，你还是没有出现…… -ext/1.wav -figureId=soyo;
wait:600;
setTransform:{"blur":10,"bloomBrightness":0.8} -target=stage-main -duration=2000 -next;
:长崎素世，索玲，苏幽玲;
wait:400;
; --------
pixiInit;
setTransform:{"blur":0,"bloomBrightness":1.0} -target=stage-main -duration=2500 -next;
changeFigure: -id=soyo -next;
changeBg:ext/稀树草原.png -transform={"brightness":0.85,"bloom":0.7,"bloomBrightness":0.56,"bloomBlur":2} -next;
:女巫，仙人，伪神……;
wait:300;
changeBg:ext/金字塔.png -transform={"brightness":0.7,"bloom":0.5,"bloomBlur":3,"bevel":1.0,"bevelThickness":18,"bevelRotation":30.0,"bevelRed":255,"bevelGreen":204,"bevelBlue":148} -next;
:在这个世界上，有很多她的名字。;
:无论是尼罗河畔的金字塔;
changeBg:ext/富士山.png -transform={"brightness":1.26,"contrast":0.8,"saturation":0.7,"gamma":0.5,"colorRed":227,"colorGreen":227,"colorBlue":227,"bloom":0.7,"bloomBrightness":0.8,"bloomBlur":10} -next;
:还是富士山上的神社;
:人们总是能寻到她的身影，仿佛历史长河中诞生相似的花。;
wait:300;
:素世也不知道自己活了多少年了，懒得记，也懒得想;
wait:200;
; --------
pixiPerform:rain;
changeBg:ext/白桦林.png -transform={"position":{"x":-760,"y":-300},"scale":{"x":1.6,"y":1.6},"brightness":0.86,"contrast":0.8,"saturation":0.7,"gamma":0.5,"colorRed":255,"colorGreen":234,"colorBlue":214,"bloom":1.0,"bloomBrightness":0.7,"bloomBlur":2} -next;

:素世趴在墓碑上，口中呢喃。;

changeFigure:anon/live_event_297_sr/model.json -id=anon -transform={"position":{"x":-1700},"brightness":0.8,"contrast":1.1,"saturation":0.9,"gamma":0.8,"colorRed":242,"colorGreen":216,"colorBlue":194,"bloom":0.5,"bloomBrightness":0.8,"bloomBlur":10,"bevel":1.0,"bevelThickness":15,"bevelRotation":30.0,"bevelRed":255,"bevelGreen":212,"bevelBlue":176} -next;
:就在自己闭上眼打算眯上一会时，一道令人气恼，但有无可奈何，甚至有些暗中欣喜的声音，从白桦林的另一头响起——;
changeFigure:soyo/live_event_297_ur/model.json -id=soyo -motion=soyo/cry02 -next;
千早爱音:soyorin！中世纪结束了，我回来了！ -ext/3.wav -figureId=anon;

:和永生的自己相比，即使爱音获得了从未来延寿的技术，也不过是自己生命长河中小小的一片浪花。;
changeFigure:soyo/live_event_297_ur/model.json -id=soyo -motion=soyo/serious02 -next;

wait:100;

:真美;

:然后爱音开口说话了——;

:像是在惋惜，又像是在道别。;
wait:300;
changeFigure:ext/爱音复古棕色风衣/037_school_winter-2023.model.json -id=anon -motion=sad01 -next;
:自己的寿命在人类文明面前，在素世面前可能就只有短短一瞬间吧;
wait:200;
changeFigure:ext/爱音复古棕色风衣/037_school_winter-2023.model.json -id=anon -motion=kime02 -expression=smile01 -next;
:自己要把生命散开，在所有有用的时间，散开在对方每一个最重要的瞬间;
wait:100;
changeFigure:ext/爱音复古棕色风衣/037_school_winter-2023.model.json -id=anon -motion=smile01 -next;

changeFigure:soyo/live_event_250_ur/model.json -id=soyo -motion=mutsumi/sad01 -expression=sakiko/cry02 -next;
